quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves
Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves
Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds
Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds

rules.rule_text: Gradients must only be selected from the approved set: Brand Blue (#00529b) to Dark Navy (#011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue masthead/waves; Sky Blue (#358CCB) to Deep Blue (#003D74) for blue backgrounds/waves; Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) to White (#ffffff) to Light Blue (#E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; or Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) to 75% Gold to Sunshine (#faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.rule_text: Gradients must run horizontally in masthead/banner applications from dark/saturated to light (left to right). They are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.
